How does Bong Joon-ho use microanalytical film techniques to explore social

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Frequent, accurate scene references clearly linked to analytical claims
Secure factual knowledge of plot, setting and characters
Sustained interpretation of contrasts in space, props and sound
weaknesses: Broad socio-political assertions not always unpacked through specific microelements
Secondary sources used more for context than as analytical support
Lack of precise time stamps for some scene references
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work demonstrates good knowledge and understanding, with effective and sustained interpretation of film elements in relation to the research question. References are generally relevant and support the argument well, though a few citations lack precision and secondary sources are not fully integrated into the analysis. This aligns with band 4 descriptors.

strengths: Insightful analysis of camera angles, framing and symbolic elements like the scholarâs stone
Precise shot analysis linking mise-en-scÃ¨ne and editing to themes of class mobility
Identification of non-diegetic sound and slow-motion editing to shape tension
weaknesses: Occasional lapses into descriptive commentary without deeper evaluation
Analysis of sound design could benefit from more technical detail
Some sections (e.g., modern design discussion) need expanded interpretive depth
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay provides appropriate and at times insightful evaluation of textual features and authorial choices, consistently connecting film techniques to thematic concerns. Although a few passages rely on description, the overall strength of the analysis places it firmly in band 4.

strengths: Overall clear structure with logical progression from introduction through conclusion
Topic sentences effectively signpost the line of inquiry
Supporting examples are mostly integrated into the prose
weaknesses: Multiple figures lack descriptive captions or are misformatted
Incomplete sentences and abrupt transitions disrupt cohesion
Conclusion is concise but underdeveloped and missing implications
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the investigation is adequately organized with a coherent line of inquiry, numerous formatting issues (e.g., missing figure captions, incomplete content) and abrupt shifts prevent fully cohesive development. The integration of examples is generally sound but inconsistent, placing this criterion at band 3.

strengths: Clear and fluent language with a good range of academic vocabulary
Generally accurate grammar and sentence construction
Consistently appropriate register and style for a film analysis
weaknesses: Occasional tense inconsistencies and minor lapses in precision
Bibliography style inconsistencies affect overall presentation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Language throughout is clear and accurate, showing good control of grammar and register. Minor errors and occasional stylistic lapses keep the writing just below the high-precision threshold for band 5, aligning it with band 4.

strandSelections.reasoning: Supporting examplesâfilm stills, scene descriptions and brief scholarly referencesâare **mostly well woven** into sentences, illustrating points without breaking prose flow. A handful of examples are dropped in without substantial commentary, keeping the work just below the consistently elegant integration associated with the top band.

The student demonstrates **secure factual knowledge of plot, setting and characters** and links these accurately to South-Korean socio-economic realities. Each body paragraph maintains focus on the research question and offers sustained interpretation of what the contrasts in space, props and sound imply about social mobility. The discussion goes beyond surface description, yet the argument occasionally relies on broad socio-political assertions (ârigid hierarchyâ) that are not fully unpacked through the micro-elements, so the interpretation stops short of the âpersuasiveâ depth required for the top band.

The investigation is **clearly structured**: introduction, thematically organised body sections and a concise conclusion. Topic sentences signpost the line of inquiry and paragraphs generally build logically. Minor repetition and occasional abrupt transitions (between sound and editing discussion) prevent a fully seamless cohesion, but overall organisation is strong and the argument is developed to an adequate depth.

Scene references are **frequent, accurate and clearly linked** to the claims being advanced (e.g., low-angle window shot, scholarâs stone sequence, bunker confrontation). Still images are labelled and cited in prose, and secondary sources are listed. A few citations are general (no time stamps) and the scholarly sources are used for background rather than analytical support, so the textual support is effective but not exemplary.

The tone is **consistently academic and objective**, appropriate to an HL film analysis. First-person references are avoided, and technical terminology is used effectively. Some phrasing is slightly informal (âthe only place where they can get oneâ), indicating room for refinement, but overall register and style remain suitable throughout.

Language is **clear, fluent and generally accurate**. Vocabulary such as âmicroanalytical,â ânon-diegetic,â and âharbingerâ shows range; grammar lapses are minor (e.g., occasional tense inconsistency, missing articles) and do not impede meaning. Precision and stylistic polish fall short of the âhigh degree of accuracyâ threshold for band 5.

The essay provides **appropriate and sometimes insightful analysis** of camera angles, framing, setting, props, sound and editing, consistently linking these choices to the theme of class mobility. Moments such as the upward ascent of the hill or the transformation of the scholarâs stone show interpretive insight; however, other sections lapse into descriptive commentary (e.g., basic statements about âmodern minimalistic designâ) without further evaluative depth. Hence the work fits solidly within band 4 rather than reaching the consistently convincing sophistication of band 5.

annotations.comment: The contrast between tight framing for the Kims and wide shots for the Parks is well observed; consider linking this explicitly to viewer positioning and empathy.
The text fragment ending abruptly (âaboveâ) suggests missing content. Ensure all sentences are complete and analysis is uninterrupted.
The analysis of the toilet-WiFi scene vividly illustrates how mise-en-scÃ¨ne conveys desperation and adaptability in substandard living spaces.
The research question is clearly stated, effectively framing the scope and focus of the investigation into microanalytical film techniques.

The introduction makes broad socio-political claims (e.g., ârigid hierarchyâ) without unpacking how these are conveyed through specific microelements in the film. Link these assertions explicitly to scenes or devices.

Secondary sources are introduced for background but not fully integrated into the analytical argument. Use scholarly references to support specific interpretive claims rather than only contextual information.
Figure 1 is labelled but lacks a descriptive caption. Provide a brief explanation of what the still illustrates and its relevance to the argument.
Figure 2 is correctly embedded but the caption should go beyond numbering to describe the shot and explain its analytical significance.
Figure 3 remains uncaptioned aside from its label; include a caption explaining camera angle, framing and its implication for class contrast.
Figure 4 label is present but does not guide the reader. Add a descriptive caption that situates the image within the textual analysis.
The discussion of camera angles and framing is precise and consistently linked to themes of class inequality, demonstrating solid analytical understanding.

Several passages revert to description (e.g., âmodern minimalistic designâ) without deeper evaluation of how these design elements advance the filmâs critique of class. Expand these sections with interpretive commentary.
The metaphor of ascending the hill (Fig. 5) to represent social aspiration is insightful and connects mise-en-scÃ¨ne to class struggle effectively.
The heading âFigure 6â is formatted as a section header. Reformat this as a caption and integrate it into the figure group for clarity.
Identification of non-diegetic sound and slow-motion editing demonstrates a clear grasp of sound and editing choices in shaping tension.
The discussion of sound design would benefit from more precise technical detail (e.g., frequency shifts, silence use) to deepen evaluation.
The conclusion succinctly restates main points but could be expanded to reflect on the wider implications of the analysis and to propose further lines of inquiry.
The introductory context effectively situates the film within South Koreaâs socio-economic landscape, demonstrating good knowledge and understanding.
Figure 7 lacks descriptive detail in its caption. Include an explanatory caption that ties the scholarâs stone to its narrative role.
The introduction of the scholarâs stone is promising but cuts off mid-analysis. Continue the discussion of its transformation arc for completeness.
The analysis of the scholarâs stone evolving from a talisman to a weapon is perceptive and demonstrates strong understanding of symbolic mise-en-scÃ¨ne.
The quotation from Hae-rin (2021) is dropped in without critique. Engage with this claim to explore how permanence of wealth is dramatized in the film.
The detailed shot analysis (e.g., low-/high-angle contrasts) is an excellent example of precise technical discussion in camera work.
Include precise time stamps for scene references when discussing film sequences to enhance accuracy and allow reproducibility.
Minor repetitiveness in phrasing (e.g., âand illustratesâ) slightly disrupts flow. Review sentence variety for clearer expression.
Consider integrating a brief quotation of dialogue or a subtitle translation to ground analysis in the filmâs actual language.
The bibliography entry for Kang et al. (2023) is split across lines and lacks consistent URL formatting. Standardize reference format.
Ensure consistent bibliography style (e.g., capitalization, italics, DOI placement) across all entries to enhance academic presentation.
Figures on page 2 are visually clear, but analytical discussion of each image should be located immediately adjacent in the text.
